title: basicly skill source
description: A skill authored as skill.yaml, projected to SKILL.md at target roots.

schema_version.description: Source-format version; bump only when the loader contract changes.

name.description: Skill slug/name; must match the containing directory name.

description.description: One-line trigger description used for discovery.

instructions.description: Markdown body rendered into the projected SKILL.md.

technologies.description: Technology scoping tags (controlled vocabulary, enforced by catalog-lint); absent means universal. basicly-internal; NOT emitted into SKILL.md frontmatter.

license.description: Optional Agent Skills frontmatter: license name or bundled license file reference.

compatibility.description: Optional Agent Skills frontmatter: environment requirements (product, packages, network).

allowed-tools.description: Optional Agent Skills frontmatter (experimental): space-separated pre-approved tools.

metadata.description: Optional Agent Skills frontmatter: arbitrary string key/value map.
